case_title: KOREAN BROADCASTING CO INC VS WONG MAO CHUN et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY KOREAN BROADCASTING CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT WONG MAO CHUN WONG KYONG SUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOREAN BROADCASTING CO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG KYONG SUN $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $17.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,817.79, COMPLAINT DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT MAO CHUN WONG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
